title: I see the story. I am not the story
subtitle: A release-and-allow statement for separating inherited money beliefs from your own.
excerpt: A short energy statement for when you catch yourself running a money belief that isn't yours. The release targets the inherited story; the allow targets the freedom to write your own.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 8 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure draws on The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

content.text: A short energy statement for the moment you catch yourself running a money belief that isn't yours. Say it on a morning when the family script is louder than usual, or any time a comment from a parent or partner has lodged and won't shift.
I am ready to release the money story I inherited. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow my own money story. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.

Adapted from Day 8 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The release-and-allow structure is drawn from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), which sets out the Zone Method (Question, Check, Release, Confirm, Allow) as a framework for working with hidden money resistance.
